title: Lactose Kaboom
description: A silly simple mod adding suspicious cow's that attack back
body:
![lactose kaboom logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da4cabf07ed40475cfe7d5554540f19855a8cd9a.png)

## Description:
Add an unexpected twist to your Minecraft world with the Suspicious Cow. These enigmatic bovines aren't your average herd animals. Punch one, and it won’t just stand there it’ll punch you back with surprising strength, catching you off guard. But the real danger comes if you try to milk them. Instead of giving you milk, they’ll explode without warning, leaving destruction in their wake. Their strange behavior makes them both a challenge and a mystery to players who cross their path. Approach with caution, stay alert, and get ready to rethink how you deal with cows in Minecraft! Perfect for those who want to add some unpredictable chaos to their adventures.

## Warning:
Not all cows are suspicious
